description: Turn on whole disk encryption on all staff/volunteer computers

Install lockable filing cabinets to store sensitive material at OFD's headquarters office in Praka
Set up DDOS protection for OFD's website
Use a reputable cloud-based email service (such as Google Workspace or Microsoft Office 365) for official @ofd.org accounts
Enforce policy requiring all staff/volunteers to lock all devices (phones and computers) with strong passcodes

Buy password protected USBs for all staff/volunteers
Host the OFD website with a secure web-hosting provider

Implement two-factor authentication and strong passwords requirements for accessing the online contact management system

Establish secure backup solutions for all staff and volunteer devices and data

Install strong lock on OFD headquarters office doors and windows
Implement a trusted virtual private network (VPN) for all staff and volunteers
